case_title: HEIDI MACHEN VS. ROBERT WALKER DRYSDALE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,269.20 FILED BY MACHEN, HEIDI AS TO DEFENDANT DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACHEN, HEIDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER $1,567.30 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,652.30, FOR BODY REPAIR WORK ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACHEN, HEIDI AS TO DEFENDANT DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-30-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY MACHEN, HEIDI DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DRYSDALE, ROBERT WALKER
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
